label: Abbreviation-abbreviatedText
definition: The literal value of an instance of unstructured text that is used as the abbreviation.

label: Abbreviation-expandedText
definition: The full literal representation of the abbreviation.

label: Activity-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study activity.

label: Activity-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the study activity.

label: Activity-description
definition: A narrative representation of the study activity.

label: Address-text
definition: A standardized representation of the complete set of components denoting the physical address of the person, business, building, or organization.

label: Address-lines
definition: The street name and number, building number, apartment or unit number, or post office box number where an entity is physically located.

label: Address-district
definition: An administrative or territorial division of a city, town, county, parish, state, country, or other locality based on a shared characteristic.

label: Address-city
definition: A relatively large and/or densely populated area of human habitation with administrative or legal status that may be specified as a component of a postal address.

label: Address-postalCode
definition: An alphanumeric code assigned to a mail delivery area.

label: Address-state
definition: A sub-division of a country that forms part of a federal union. States are usually, but not always, more autonomous than provinces and may have different laws from the central government.

label: AdministrableProduct-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the administrable product.

label: AdministrableProduct-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the administrable product.

label: AdministrableProduct-description
definition: A narrative representation of the administrable product.

label: AdministrableProductProperty-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the administrable product property.

label: AdministrableProductProperty-text
definition: An instance of structured text that represents the administrable product property.

label: Administration-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) for the administration of a product, agent, or therapy.

label: Administration-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the administration of a product, agent, or therapy.

label: Administration-description
definition: A narrative representation for the administration of a product, agent, or therapy.

label: AnalysisPopulation-text
definition: An instance of unstructured text that represents the analysis population.

label: AnalysisPopulation-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the analysis population.

label: AnalysisPopulation-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the analysis population.

label: AnalysisPopulation-description
definition: A narrative representation of the analysis population.

label: AssignedPerson-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the assigned person.

label: AssignedPerson-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the assigned person.

label: AssignedPerson-description
definition: A narrative representation of the assigned person.

label: AssignedPerson-jobTitle
definition: An identifying designation related to the assigned person's occupation.

label: BiomedicalConcept-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the biomedical concept.

label: BiomedicalConcept-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the biomedical concept.

label: BiomedicalConcept-synonyms
definition: A word or an expression that serves as a figurative, symbolic, or exact substitute for a biomedical concept, and which has the same meaning.

label: BiomedicalConcept-reference
definition: A citation to an authoritative source for a biomedical concept.

label: BiomedicalConceptCategory-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the biomedical concept category.

label: BiomedicalConceptCategory-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the biomedical concept category.

label: BiomedicalConceptCategory-description
definition: A narrative representation of the biomedical concept category.

label: BiomedicalConceptProperty-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the biomedical concept property.

label: BiomedicalConceptProperty-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the biomedical concept property.

label: BiomedicalConceptProperty-isRequired
definition: An indication as to whether the biomedical concept property is required.

label: BiomedicalConceptProperty-isEnabled
definition: An indication as to whether the biomedical concept property is activated for use within a given usage context for a biomedical concept.

label: BiomedicalConceptProperty-datatype
prefLabel: Biomedical Concept Property Response Data Type
definition: The structural format of the biomedical concept property response value. The datatype is carried in the attribute and influences the set of allowable values the attribute may assume. (After HL7)

label: BiomedicalConceptSurrogate-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the biomedical concept surrogate.

label: BiomedicalConceptSurrogate-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the biomedical concept surrogate.

label: BiomedicalConceptSurrogate-description
definition: A narrative representation of the biomedical concept surrogate.

label: BiomedicalConceptSurrogate-reference
definition: A citation to an authoritative source for a biomedical concept surrogate.

label: BiospecimenRetention-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the biospecimen retention.

label: BiospecimenRetention-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the biospecimen retention.

label: BiospecimenRetention-description
definition: A narrative representation of the biospecimen retention.

label: BiospecimenRetention-isRetained
definition: An indication as to whether biospecimens were retained.

label: BiospecimenRetention-includesDNA
definition: An indication as to whether retained biospecimens contain DNA.

label: Code-code
definition: The literal value of a code.

label: Code-codeSystem
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the system used to assign and/or manage codes.

label: Code-codeSystemVersion
definition: The version of the code system.

label: Code-decode
definition: Standardized or dictionary-derived human readable text associated with a code.

label: CommentAnnotation-text
definition: An instance of unstructured text that represents the comment annotation.

label: ConditionAssignment-condition
definition: An assumption on which rests the validity or effect of something else.

label: DocumentContentReference-sectionNumber
definition: The numeric identifier of a particular section for the document content reference.

label: DocumentContentReference-sectionTitle
definition: An identifying designation for a particular section for the document content reference.

label: Duration-text
definition: An instance of unstructured text that represents the event duration.

label: Duration-durationWillVary
definition: An indication as to whether the event duration is planned to vary within and/or across subjects.

label: Duration-reasonDurationWillVary
definition: The explanation for why the event duration will vary within and/or across subjects.

label: EligibilityCriterion-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study eligibility criterion.

label: EligibilityCriterion-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the study eligibility criterion.

label: EligibilityCriterion-description
definition: A narrative representation of the study eligibility criterion.

label: EligibilityCriterion-identifier
definition: A sequence of characters used to identify, name, or characterize the inclusion or exclusion criterion.

label: Encounter-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) for a protocol-defined study encounter.

label: Encounter-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the study encounter.

label: Encounter-description
definition: A narrative representation of the protocol-defined study encounter.

label: Endpoint-purpose
definition: The textual representation of the study endpoint purpose.

label: Estimand-populationSummary
definition: A synopsis of the clinical endpoint of interest within the analysis target study population.

label: Estimand-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the estimand.

label: Estimand-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the estimand.

label: Estimand-description
definition: A narrative representation of the estimand.

label: GovernanceDate-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study governance date

label: GovernanceDate-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the study governance date.

label: GovernanceDate-description
definition: A narrative representation of the study governance date.

label: GovernanceDate-dateValue
definition: The information contained in the date field.

label: Identifier-text
definition: An instance of structured text that represents the administrable product.

label: Indication-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the disease/condition indication.

label: Indication-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the disease/condition indication.

label: Indication-description
definition: A narrative representation of the condition, disease or disorder that the clinical trial is intended to investigate or address.

label: Indication-isRareDisease
prefLabel: Disease/Condition Indication Is Rare Disease Indicator
definition: An indication as to whether the disease/condition indication under study is considered a rare disease.

label: IntercurrentEvent-strategy
definition: A textual description of the planned strategy to manage and/or mitigate intercurrent events.

label: Masking-text
definition: An instance of unstructured text that represents how the masking is performed and maintained.

label: Masking-isMasked
definition: An indication as to whether the study role is masked.

label: MedicalDevice-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the medical device.

label: MedicalDevice-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the medical device.

label: MedicalDevice-description
definition: A narrative representation of the medical device.

label: MedicalDevice-hardwareVersion
definition: A form or variant of hardware; one of a sequence of copies of the physical components from which a computer is constructed, each incorporating new modifications.

label: MedicalDevice-softwareVersion
definition: A form or variant of software; one of a sequence of copies of a software program, each incorporating new modifications. (NCI)

label: NarrativeContent-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the narrative content.

label: NarrativeContent-sectionNumber
definition: The numeric identifier assigned to a particular document section containing narrative content.

label: NarrativeContent-sectionTitle
definition: An identifying designation for the document section containing narrative content.

label: NarrativeContent-displaySectionTitle
prefLabel: Narrative Content Section Title Display Indicator
definition: An indication as to whether the section title is to be displayed in the document containing narrative content.

label: NarrativeContent-displaySectionNumber
prefLabel: Narrative Content Section Number Display Indicator
definition: An indication as to whether the section number is to be displayed in the document containing narrative content.

label: NarrativeContentItem-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the narrative content item.

label: NarrativeContentItem-text
definition: An instance of unstructured text that represents the narrative content item.

label: Organization-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the organization.

label: Organization-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the organization.

label: Organization-identifier
definition: A unique symbol that establishes identity of the organization. (BRIDG)

label: Organization-identifierScheme
definition: The name of the organization that provides the identifier for the entity.

label: ParameterMap-tag
definition: Character strings bounded by angle brackets that act as containers for programming language elements.

label: ParameterMap-reference
definition: The reference for a tag used in programming languages, such as a markup language (e.g., HTML, XML), to store attributes and elements.

label: PersonName-text
definition: An instance of structured text that represents the person's full name.

label: PersonName-familyName
definition: A word or group of words indicating a person's last (family) name.

label: PersonName-givenNames
definition: A word or group of words indicating a person's first (personal or given) name; the name that precedes the surname.

label: PersonName-prefixes
definition: An affix occurring at the start of the person name string, usually denoting a title or honorific.

label: PersonName-suffixes
definition: An affix occurring at the end of the person name, usually denoting educational or professional degrees and certifications, and/or filial rank.

label: PopulationDefinition-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study cohort.

label: PopulationDefinition-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the study cohort.

label: PopulationDefinition-description
definition: A narrative representation of the study cohort.

label: PopulationDefinition-includesHealthySubjects
prefLabel: Study Cohort Includes Healthy Subjects Indicator
definition: An indication as to whether the study cohort includes healthy subjects, that is, subjects without the disease or condition under study.

label: Procedure-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the procedure.

label: Procedure-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the procedure.

label: Procedure-description
definition: A narrative representation of the procedure.

label: Procedure-procedureType
definition: A characterization or classification of the study procedure.

label: ProductOrganizationRole-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the product organization role.

label: ProductOrganizationRole-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the product organization role.

label: ProductOrganizationRole-description
definition: A narrative representation of the product organization role.

label: Quantity-value
definition: A numerical quantity measured or assigned or computed.

label: Range-isApproximate
definition: An indication as to whether the value range is almost, but not quite, exact.

label: ResponseCode-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the response code.

label: ResponseCode-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the response code.

label: ResponseCode-isEnabled
definition: An indication as to whether the response code is activated for use within a given usage context.

label: ScheduleTimeline-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the schedule timeline.

label: ScheduleTimeline-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the schedule timeline.

label: ScheduleTimeline-description
definition: A narrative representation of the schedule timeline.

label: ScheduleTimeline-entryCondition
definition: A logical evaluation on which rests the validity of entry into a schedule timeline.

label: ScheduleTimeline-mainTimeline
definition: An indication as to whether the timeline or timeline component is part of the central or principal timeline.

label: ScheduledInstance-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the scheduled activity instance.

label: ScheduledInstance-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the scheduled activity instance.

label: ScheduledInstance-description
definition: A narrative representation of the scheduled activity instance.

label: Strength-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the substance strength.

label: Strength-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the substance strength.

label: Strength-description
definition: A narrative representation of the substance strength.

label: Study-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the clinical study.

label: Study-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the clinical study.

label: Study-description
definition: A narrative representation of the clinical study.

label: StudyAmendment-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study amendment.

label: StudyAmendment-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the study amendment.

label: StudyAmendment-description
definition: A narrative representation of the study amendment.

label: StudyAmendment-number
definition: A string of numerals that uniquely identifies a protocol amendment.

label: StudyAmendment-summary
definition: A short narrative representation describing the changes introduced in the current version of the protocol.

label: StudyAmendmentImpact-text
definition: An instance of unstructured text that represents the study amendment impact.

label: StudyAmendmentImpact-isSubstantial
definition: An indication as to whether the study amendment's impact on the study is substantial.

label: StudyAmendmentReason-otherReason
definition: The rationale for the change(s) to, or formal clarification of, a protocol that is not otherwise specified.

label: StudyArm-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study arm.

label: StudyArm-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the study arm.

label: StudyArm-description
definition: A narrative representation of the study arm.

label: StudyArm-dataOriginDescription
definition: The textual representation of the study arm data origin.

label: StudyChange-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study change.

label: StudyChange-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the study change.

label: StudyChange-description
definition: A narrative representation of the study change.

label: StudyChange-rationale
definition: An explanation as to the logical reasons for why a study change has occurred.

label: StudyChange-summary
definition: A short narrative representation describing the changes introduced in the current version of the study.

label: StudyDefinitionDocument-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study definition document.

label: StudyDefinitionDocument-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the study definition document.

label: StudyDefinitionDocument-description
definition: A narrative representation of the study definition document.

label: StudyDefinitionDocument-templateName
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study definition document template.

label: StudyDefinitionDocumentVersion-version
definition: A sequence of characters used to identify the version of the study definition document.

label: StudyDesign-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the interventional study design.

label: StudyDesign-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the interventional study design.

label: StudyDesign-description
definition: A narrative representation of the interventional study design.

label: StudyDesign-rationale
definition: Reason(s) for choosing the interventional study design. This may include reasons for the choice of control or comparator, as well as the scientific rationale for the study design.

label: StudyElement-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study design element.

label: StudyElement-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the study design element.

label: StudyElement-description
definition: A narrative representation of the study design element.

label: StudyEpoch-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study epoch, i.e., the named time period defined in the protocol, wherein a study activity is specified and unchanging throughout the interval, to support a study-specific purpose.

label: StudyEpoch-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the study epoch.

label: StudyEpoch-description
definition: A narrative representation of the study epoch.

label: StudyIntervention-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study intervention.

label: StudyIntervention-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the study intervention.

label: StudyIntervention-description
definition: A narrative representation of the study intervention.

label: StudyRole-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study role.

label: StudyRole-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the study role.

label: StudyRole-description
definition: A narrative representation of the study role.

label: StudySite-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the study site.

label: StudySite-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the study site.

label: StudySite-description
definition: A narrative representation of the study site.

label: StudyTitle-text
definition: An instance of unstructured text that represents the study title.

label: StudyVersion-versionIdentifier
definition: A sequence of characters used to identify, name, or characterize the study version.

label: StudyVersion-rationale
definition: A statement describing the overall rationale of the study. This field describes the contribution of this study to product development, i.e., what knowledge is being contributed from the conduct of this study.

label: SubjectEnrollment-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the subject enrollment.

label: SubjectEnrollment-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the subject enrollment..

label: SubjectEnrollment-description
definition: A narrative representation of the subject enrollment.

label: Substance-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the substance.

label: Substance-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the substance.

label: Substance-description
definition: A narrative representation of the substance.

label: SyntaxTemplate-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the characteristic.

label: SyntaxTemplate-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the characteristic.

label: SyntaxTemplate-description
definition: A narrative representation of the characteristic.

label: SyntaxTemplate-text
definition: An instance of structured text that represents the characteristic.

label: SyntaxTemplateDictionary-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the syntax template dictionary.

label: SyntaxTemplateDictionary-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the syntax template dictionary.

label: SyntaxTemplateDictionary-description
definition: A narrative representation of the syntax template dictionary.

label: Timing-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the timing.

label: Timing-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the timing.

label: Timing-description
definition: A narrative representation of the chronological relationship between temporal events.

label: Timing-value
definition: The temporal value of the chronological relationship between temporal events.

label: Timing-valueLabel
definition: The short descriptive designation for the timing value.

label: Timing-windowLabel
definition: The short descriptive designation for a time period, or other type of interval, during which a temporal event may be achieved, obtained, or observed.

label: Timing-windowLower
definition: The earliest chronological value of an allowable period of time during which a temporal event takes place.

label: Timing-windowUpper
definition: The latest chronological value of an allowable period of time during which a temporal event takes place.

label: TransitionRule-name
definition: The literal identifier (i.e., distinctive designation) of the transition rule.

label: TransitionRule-label
definition: The short descriptive designation for the transition rule.

label: TransitionRule-description
definition: A narrative representation of the transition rule.

label: TransitionRule-text
definition: An instance of unstructured text that represents the transition rule.

label: Abbreviation-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the abbreviation.

label: Activity-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the activity.

label: Activity-definedProcedures
definition: A USDM relationship between the Activity and Procedure classes which identifies the set of defined procedures associated with the activity.

label: Activity-biomedicalConceptIds
definition: A USDM relationship between the Activity and BiomedicalConcept classes which identifies the set of biomedical concepts associated with the activity.

label: Activity-nextId
definition: A USDM relationship within the Activity class which identifies the activity that follows the current activity in the display order.

label: Activity-timelineId
definition: A USDM relationship between the Activity and ScheduleTimeline classes which provides the details associated with an instance of the scheduled timeline related to the activity.

label: Activity-childIds
definition: A USDM relationship within the Activity class which identifies the set of child activities associated with an activity.

label: Activity-previousId
definition: A USDM relationship within the Activity class which identifies the activity that precedes the current activity in the display order.

label: Activity-bcSurrogateIds
definition: A USDM relationship between the Activity and BiomedicalConceptSurrogate classes which identifies the set of biomedical concept surrogates associated with the activity.

label: Activity-bcCategoryIds
definition: A USDM relationship between the Activity and BiomedicalConceptCategory classes which identifies the set of biomedical concept categories associated with the activity.

label: Address-country
definition: A sovereign nation occupying a distinct territory and ruled by an autonomous government.
boundCodelistNote: Y (Point out to ISO 3166-1 Alpha-3 Country code)

label: AdministrableProduct-administrableDoseForm
definition: The physical form in which formulated ingredient(s) are presented in the administrable product.

label: AdministrableProduct-sourcing
definition: An indication as to whether the administrable product is obtained from a local or central source.

label: AdministrableProduct-productDesignation
definition: An indication as to whether the administrable product is an investigational medicinal product or an auxiliary medicinal product.

label: AdministrableProduct-pharmacologicClass
definition: The pharmacological class of the administrable product.
boundCodelistNote: Y (Points to external codelists such as UNII, MED-RT)

label: AdministrableProduct-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the administrable product.

label: AdministrableProduct-identifiers
definition: A USDM relationship between the AdministrableProduct and AdministrableProductIdentifier classes which provides the set of identifiers related to the administrable product.

label: AdministrableProduct-properties
definition: A USDM relationship between the AdministrableProduct and AdministrableProductProperty classes which provides the set of properties related to the administrable product.

label: AdministrableProduct-ingredients
definition: A USDM relationship between the AdministrableProduct and Ingredient classes which provides the set of ingredients related to the administrable product.

label: AdministrableProductProperty-type
definition: A characterization or classification of the administrable product property.

label: AdministrableProductProperty-quantity
definition: The numeric value associated with an administrable product property.

label: Administration-dose
definition: The value representing the amount of an agent given to an individual at one time.

label: Administration-frequency
definition: The number of doses administered per a specific interval.

label: Administration-route
definition: The pathway by which a substance is administered in order to reach the site of action in the body.

label: Administration-duration
definition: The amount of time elapsed during the administration of an agent.

label: Administration-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the administration of the product, agent, or therapy.

label: Administration-administrableProductId
definition: A USDM relationship between the Administration and AdministrableProductDefinition classes which identifies the administrable product associated with the administration of the product, agent, or therapy.

label: Administration-medicalDeviceId
definition: A USDM relationship between the Administration and MedicalDevice classes which identifies the medical device associated with an instance of product, agent, or therapy administration.

label: AliasCode-standardCode
definition: A combination of symbols that is used to represent the standard code.

label: AliasCode-standardCodeAliases
definition: Alternative combinations of symbols used to represent aliases or alternatives to the standard code.

label: AnalysisPopulation-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the analysis population.

label: AnalysisPopulation-subsetOfIds
definition: A USDM relationship between the AnalysisPopulation and PopulationDefinition classes which identifies the population definition of which the analysis population is a subset.

label: AssignedPerson-personName
definition: A word or group of words indicating the identity of an assigned person usually consisting of a first (personal) name and a last (family) name with an optional middle name. In some cultural traditions the family name comes first.

label: AssignedPerson-organizationId
definition: A USDM relationship between the AssignedPerson and Organization classes that identifies that organization to which the assigned person belongs.

label: BiomedicalConcept-code
definition: A concept unique identifier assigned to a biomedical concept that points to the meaning of that biomedical concept.

label: BiomedicalConcept-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the biomedical concept.

label: BiomedicalConcept-properties
definition: A USDM relationship between the BiomedicalConcept and BiomedicalConceptProperty classes which identifies the set of properties associated with the biomedical concept.

label: BiomedicalConceptCategory-code
definition: A symbol or combination of symbols which is assigned to the biomedical concept category.

label: BiomedicalConceptCategory-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the biomedical concept category.

label: BiomedicalConceptCategory-memberIds
definition: A USDM relationship between the BiomedicalConceptCategory and BiomedicalConcept classes which identifies the set of biomedical concept members associated with the biomedical concept category.

label: BiomedicalConceptCategory-childIds
definition: A USDM relationship within the BiomedicalConceptCategory class which identifies the set of child categories of a biomedical concept.

label: BiomedicalConceptProperty-code
definition: A concept unique identifier assigned to a biomedical concept property that points to the meaning of that biomedical concept property.

label: BiomedicalConceptProperty-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the biomedical concept property.

label: BiomedicalConceptProperty-responseCodes
definition: A USDM relationship between the BiomedicalConceptProperty and ResponseCode classes which identifies the set of response codes associated with the biomedical concept property.

label: BiomedicalConceptSurrogate-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the biomedical concept surrogate.

label: CommentAnnotation-codes
definition: A symbol or combination of symbols which is assigned to the comment annotation.

label: Condition-contextIds
definition: A USDM relationship between the Condition and the ScheduledActivityInstance or Activity classes which identifies the scheduled activity instance or activity to which the condition belongs.

label: Condition-appliesToIds
definition: A USDM relationship between the Condition and the Activity, Procedure, BiomedicalConcept, BiomedicalConceptSurrogate, or BiomedicalConceptCategory classes which identifies the procedure, activity, biomedical concept, biomedical concept surrogate, or biomedical concept category that applies to the condition.

label: ConditionAssignment-conditionTargetId
definition: A USDM relationship between the ConditionAssignment and ScheduledInstance classes which identifies the scheduled instance associated with the condition assignment.

label: DocumentContentReference-appliesToId
definition: A USDM relationship between the DocumentContentReference and StudyDefinitionDocument classes which identifies the study definition document to which the document content reference applies.

label: Duration-quantity
definition: The value representing the amount of time over which the event occurs.

label: EligibilityCriterion-category
definition: A classification of the inclusion exclusion criterion.

label: EligibilityCriterion-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the eligibility criterion.

label: EligibilityCriterion-criterionItemId
definition: A USDM relationship between the EligibilityCriterion and EligibilityCriterionItem classes which identifies the item belonging to the eligibility criterion.

label: EligibilityCriterion-nextId
definition: A USDM relationship within the EligibilityCriterion class which identifies the eligibility criterion that follows the current eligibility criterion in the display order.

label: EligibilityCriterion-previousId
definition: A USDM relationship within the EligibilityCriterion class which identifies the eligibility criterion that precedes the current eligibility criterion in the display order.

label: Encounter-type
definition: A characterization or classification of the study encounter.

label: Encounter-environmentalSettings
definition: The environment/setting where the event, intervention, or finding occurred.

label: Encounter-contactModes
definition: The means by which an interaction occurs between the subject/participant and person or entity (e.g., a device).

label: Encounter-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the study encounter.

label: Encounter-transitionEndRule
definition: A USDM relationship between the Encounter and TransitionRule classes which provides the details associated with a transition rule used to trigger the end of an encounter.

label: Encounter-nextId
definition: A USDM relationship within the Encounter class which identifies the encounter that chronologically follows the current encounter.

label: Encounter-transitionStartRule
definition: A USDM relationship between the Encounter and TransitionRule classes which provides the details associated with a transition rule used to trigger the start of an encounter.

label: Encounter-scheduledAtId
definition: A USDM relationship between the Encounter and Timing classes which provides information related to the scheduled timing of an encounter.

label: Encounter-previousId
definition: A USDM relationship within the Encounter class which identifies the encounter that chronologically precedes the current encounter.

label: Endpoint-level
definition: A characterization or classification of the study endpoint that determines its category of importance relative to other study endpoints.

label: Estimand-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the study estimand.

label: Estimand-analysisPopulationId
definition: A USDM relationship between the Estimand and AnalysisPopulation classes which provides the details associated with an instance of the analysis population used to partially define a study estimand.

label: Estimand-variableOfInterestId
definition: A USDM relationship between the Estimand and Endpoint classes which provides the details associated with an instance of the variable of interest within a study endpoint used to partially define a study estimand.

label: Estimand-intercurrentEvents
definition: A USDM relationship between the Estimand and IntercurrentEvent classes which identifies the set of intercurrent events associated with a study estimand.

label: Estimand-interventionIds
definition: A USDM relationship between the Estimand and StudyIntervention classes which identifies the set of study interventions associated with the Estimand.

label: GeographicScope-type
definition: A characterization or classification of the geographic scope.

label: GeographicScope-code
definition: A symbol or combination of symbols which is assigned to the geographic scope.
boundCodelistNote: Y (Point out to external dictionaries: Standard code is ISO-3166; Alias codes drawn from GENC, UN Region Codes, etc.)

label: GovernanceDate-type
definition: A characterization or classification of the study governance date.

label: GovernanceDate-geographicScopes
definition: A USDM relationship between the GovernanceDate and GeographicScope classes which identifies the set of geographic scopes associated with the governance date.

label: Identifier-scopeId
definition: A USDM relationship between the AdministrableProductIdentifier and Organization class which provides the details associated with which provides the details associated with each organization that has assigned the administrable product identifier.

label: Indication-codes
definition: A short sequence of characters that represents the disease/condition indication.
boundCodelistNote: Y (Point out to multiple Biomedical coding dictionaries such as SNOMEDCT (for FDA), MedDRA, NCIt, ICD's, etc.)

label: Indication-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the disease/condition indication.

label: Ingredient-role
definition: The intended use of the ingredient within the context of the compounded substance or mixture.
boundCodelistNote: Y (Point to FHIR value set: Ingredient Role)

label: Ingredient-substance
definition: A USDM relationship between the Ingredient and Substance classes that identifies the substance associated with the ingredient.

label: InterventionalStudyDesign-model
definition: The general design of the strategy for assigning interventions to subjects in a clinical study. (clinicaltrials.gov)

label: InterventionalStudyDesign-subTypes
definition: The nature of the interventional study for which information is being collected.

label: InterventionalStudyDesign-blindingSchema
definition: The type of experimental design used to describe the level of awareness of the study subjects and/ or study personnel as it relates to the respective intervention(s) or assessments being observed, received or administered.

label: InterventionalStudyDesign-intentTypes
definition: The planned purpose of the therapy, device, or agent under study in the clinical trial.

label: MedicalDevice-sourcing
definition: An indication as to whether the medical device is obtained from a local or central source.

label: MedicalDevice-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the medical device.

label: MedicalDevice-embeddedProductId
definition: A USDM relationship between the MedicalDevice and AdministrableProduct classes which identifies the administrable product that is an integral component of the medical device.

label: MedicalDevice-identifiers
definition: A USDM relationship between the MedicalDevice and MedicalDeviceIdentifier classes which provides the set of identifiers related to the medical device.

label: MedicalDeviceIdentifier-type
definition: A characterization or classification of the medical device identifier.

label: NarrativeContent-contentItemId
definition: A USDM relationship between the NarrativeContent and NarrativeContentItem classes which identifies the content item associated with the narrative content.

label: NarrativeContent-previousId
definition: A USDM relationship within the NarrativeContent class which identifies the narrative content that precedes the current narrative content in the display order.

label: NarrativeContent-nextId
definition: A USDM relationship within the NarrativeContent class which identifies the narrative content that follows the current narrative content in the display order.

label: NarrativeContent-childIds
definition: A USDM relationship within the NarrativeContent class which identifies the set of child content associated with an instance of narrative content.

label: Objective-level
definition: A characterization or classification of the study objective that determines its category of importance relative to other study objectives.

label: Objective-endpoints
definition: A USDM relationship between the Objective and Endpoint classes which identifies the set of endpoints associated with the study objective.

label: ObservationalStudyDesign-model
definition: The general design of the strategy for identifying and following up with participants during observational studies. (clinicaltrials.gov)

label: ObservationalStudyDesign-subTypes
definition: The nature of the observational study for which information is being collected.

label: ObservationalStudyDesign-timePerspective
definition: The temporal relationship between the observation period and time of subject enrollment. (ClinicalTrials.gov)

label: ObservationalStudyDesign-samplingMethod
definition: The sampling method used to assign study participants into groups or cohorts within an observational study.

label: Organization-type
definition: A characterization or classification of the formalized group of persons or other organizations collected together for a common purpose (such as administrative, legal, political) and the infrastructure to carry out that purpose.

label: Organization-legalAddress
definition: A USDM relationship between the Organization and Address classes which provides the legal address for an organization.

label: Organization-managedSites
definition: A USDM relationship between the Organization and StudySite classes which identifies the set of study sites managed by the organization.

label: PopulationDefinition-plannedSex
definition: The protocol-defined sex within the study cohort.

label: PopulationDefinition-plannedAge
definition: The anticipated age of subjects within the study cohort.

label: PopulationDefinition-plannedCompletionNumber
definition: The value representing the planned number of subjects that must complete the study in order to meet the objectives and endpoints of the study, within the study cohort.

label: PopulationDefinition-plannedEnrollmentNumber
definition: The value representing the planned number of subjects to be entered in a clinical trial, within the study cohort.

label: PopulationDefinition-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the study cohort.

label: PopulationDefinition-criterionIds
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyCohort and EligibilityCriterion classes which identifies the set of eligibility criteria associated with the study cohort.

label: Procedure-code
definition: A symbol or combination of symbols which is assigned to medical procedure.
boundCodelistNote: Y (Point out to external dictionary like CPT, MedDRA, SNOMEDCT, etc.)

label: Procedure-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the procedure.

label: Procedure-studyInterventionId
definition: A USDM relationship between the Procedure and StudyInterventionclasses which provides the details associated with an instance of an intervention performed during the conduct of a procedure.

label: ProductOrganizationRole-code
definition: A symbol or combination of symbols which is assigned to the product organization role.

label: ProductOrganizationRole-appliesToIds
definition: A USDM relationship between the ProductOrganizationRole and either the AdministrableProduct or MedicalDevice class that identifies the administrable product or medical device to which the product organization role applies.

label: ProductOrganizationRole-organizationId
definition: A USDM relationship between the ProductOrganizationRole and Organization classes which identifies the organization associated with the product organization role.

label: Quantity-unit
definition: The type of unit of measure being used to express a quantity.

label: Range-minValue
definition: The smallest value in quantity or degree in a set of values.

label: Range-maxValue
definition: The largest value in quantity or degree in a set of values.

label: ReferenceIdentifier-type
definition: A characterization or classification of the reference identifier.

label: ResponseCode-code
definition: The literal value of a response code.

label: ScheduleTimeline-plannedDuration
definition: The period of time over which the scheduled timeline is intended to take place.

label: ScheduleTimeline-instances
definition: A USDM relationship between the ScheduleTimeline and ScheduledInstance classes which identifies the set of scheduled instances (e.g., scheduled activity instances or scheduled decision instances) associated with the scheduled timeline.

label: ScheduleTimeline-entryId
definition: A USDM relationship between the ScheduleTimeline and ScheduledInstance classes which defines the entry into a scheduled instance (e.g., scheduled activity instances or scheduled decision instances) for a timeline.

label: ScheduleTimeline-exits
definition: A USDM relationship between the ScheduleTimeline and ScheduleTimelineExit classes which identifies the set of exits from the scheduled timeline.

label: ScheduleTimeline-timings
definition: A USDM relationship between the ScheduleTimeline and Timing classes which identifies the set of timings associated with the scheduled timeline.

label: ScheduledActivityInstance-activityIds
definition: A USDM relationship between the ScheduledActivityInstance and Activity classes which identifies the set of activities associated with a scheduled activity instance.

label: ScheduledActivityInstance-encounterId
definition: A USDM relationship between the ScheduledActivityInstance and Encounter classes which defines the subject encounter associated with the ScheduleActivityInstance.

label: ScheduledActivityInstance-timelineId
definition: A USDM relationship between the ScheduledActivityInstance and ScheduleTimeline classes which provides the details associated with an instance of a scheduled timeline related to a scheduled activity instance.

label: ScheduledActivityInstance-timelineExitId
definition: A USDM relationship between the ScheduledActivityInstance and ScheduleTimelineExit classes which provides the details associated with the exit from a timeline related to a scheduled activity instance.

label: ScheduledDecisionInstance-conditionAssignments
definition: A USDM relationship between the ScheduledDecisionInstance and ConditionAssignment classes which identifies the set of condition assignments associated with a scheduled decision instance.

label: ScheduledInstance-defaultConditionId
definition: A USDM relationship within the ScheduledActivityInstance class which identifies the default condition within a scheduled activity instance.

label: ScheduledInstance-epochId
definition: A USDM relationship between the ScheduledActivityInstance and StudyEpoch classes which identifies the study epoch associated with a scheduled activity instance.

label: Strength-numerator
definition: The dividend of a fraction.

label: Strength-denominator
definition: The divisor of a fraction.

label: Study-versions
definition: A USDM relationship between the Study and StudyVersion classes which identifies the set of versions associated with the study.

label: Study-documentedBy
definition: A USDM relationship between the Study and StudyDefinitionDocument classes signifying that the study is documented in a study definition document.

label: StudyAmendment-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the study amendment.

label: StudyAmendment-geographicScopes
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyAmendment and GeographicScope classes which identifies the set of geographic scopes associated with the study amendment.

label: StudyAmendment-dateValues
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyAmendment and GovernanceDate classes which provides the set of governance dates associated with the study amendment.

label: StudyAmendment-impacts
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyAmendment and StudyAmendmentImpact classes which identifies the set of impacts that the study amendment has on the study or study subjects.

label: StudyAmendment-enrollments
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyAmendment and SubjectEnrollment classes which provides the set of subject enrollments associated with the study amendment.

label: StudyAmendment-secondaryReasons
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyAmendment and StudyAmendmentReason classes which identifies the set of secondary reasons for issuing the study amendment.

label: StudyAmendment-changes
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyAmendment and  StudyChange classes which identifies the set of changes associated with the study amendment.

label: StudyAmendment-previousId
definition: A USDM relationship within the StudyAmendment class which identifies the study amendment that chronologically precedes the current study amendment.

label: StudyAmendment-primaryReason
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyAmendment and StudyAmendmentReason classes which identifies the primary reason for issuing the study amendment.

label: StudyAmendmentImpact-type
definition: A characterization or classification of the study amendment impact.

label: StudyAmendmentImpact-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the study amendment impact.

label: StudyAmendmentReason-code
definition: A symbol or combination of symbols which is assigned to the study amendment reason.

label: StudyArm-type
definition: A characterization or classification of the study arm.

label: StudyArm-dataOriginType
definition: A characterization or classification of the study arm with respect to where the study arm data originates.

label: StudyArm-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the study arm.

label: StudyArm-populationIds
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyArm and PopulationDefinition classes which identifies the set of populations associated with the study arm.

label: StudyCell-armId
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyCell and StudyArm classes which identifies the study arm associated with a study cell.

label: StudyCell-epochId
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyCell and StudyEpoch classes which identifies the study epoch associated with a study cell.

label: StudyCell-elementIds
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyCell and StudyElement classes which identifies the set of study elements associated with the study cell.

label: StudyChange-changedSections
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyChange and DocumentContentReference class which provides the set of changed document sections related to the study change.

label: StudyCohort-characteristics
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyCohort and Characteristic classes which identifies the set of subject characteristics associated with the study cohort.

label: StudyCohort-indicationIds
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyCohort and Indication classes which identifies the set of indications associated with the study cohort.

label: StudyDefinitionDocument-type
definition: A characterization or classification of the study definition document.

label: StudyDefinitionDocument-language
definition: The language in which the study definition document is written.
boundCodelistNote: Y (Point out to ISO 639 language value list)

label: StudyDefinitionDocument-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the study definition document.

label: StudyDefinitionDocument-childIds
definition: A USDM relationship within the StudyDefinitionDocument class which identifies the set of child documents of a study definition document.

label: StudyDefinitionDocument-versions
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyDefinitionDocument and StudyDefinitionDocumentVersion classes which identifies the set of versions associated with the study definition document.

label: StudyDefinitionDocumentVersion-status
definition: A condition of the study definition document at a point in time with respect to its state of readiness for implementation.

label: StudyDefinitionDocumentVersion-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the study definition document version.

label: StudyDefinitionDocumentVersion-dateValues
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyDefinitionDocumentVersion and GovernanceDate classes which provides the set of governance dates associated with the study definition document version.

label: StudyDefinitionDocumentVersion-contents
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyDefinitionDocumentVersion and NarrativeContent classes which identifies the set of narrative content associated with the version of the study definition document.

label: StudyDesign-therapeuticAreas
definition: A categorization of a disease, disorder, or other condition based on common characteristics and often associated with a medical specialty focusing on research and development of specific therapeutic interventions for the purpose of treatment and prevention, which is associated with the interventional study design.

label: StudyDesign-studyType
definition: The study type associated with the interventional study design.

label: StudyDesign-characteristics
definition: The distinguishing qualities or prominent aspects of an interventional study design.

label: StudyDesign-studyPhase
definition: The study phase associated with the interventional study design.

label: StudyDesign-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the interventional study design.

label: StudyDesign-activities
definition: A USDM relationship between the InterventionalStudyDesign and Activity classes which identifies the set of activities associated with the interventional study design.

label: StudyDesign-biospecimenRetentions
definition: A USDM relationship between the InterventionalStudyDesign and BiospecimenRetention classes which identifies the status of biospecimen retentions related to the interventional study design.

label: StudyDesign-eligibilityCriteria
definition: A USDM relationship between the InterventionalStudyDesign and EligibilityCriterion classes which identifies the set of eligibility criterion associated with the interventional study design.

label: StudyDesign-encounters
definition: A USDM relationship between the InterventionalStudyDesign and Encounter classes which identifies the set of encounters associated with the interventional study design.

label: StudyDesign-estimands
definition: A USDM relationship between the InterventionalStudyDesign and Estimand classes which identifies the set of estimands associated with the interventional study design.

label: StudyDesign-indications
definition: A USDM relationship between the InterventionalStudyDesign and Indication classes which identifies the set of indications associated with the interventional study design.

label: StudyDesign-objectives
definition: A USDM relationship between the InterventionalStudyDesign and Objective classes which identifies the set of objectives associated with the interventional study design.

label: StudyDesign-scheduleTimelines
definition: A USDM relationship between the InterventionalStudyDesign and ScheduleTimeline classes which identifies the set of scheduled timelines associated with the interventional study design.

label: StudyDesign-arms
definition: A USDM relationship between the InterventionalStudyDesign and StudyArm classes which identifies the set of study arms associated with the interventional study design.

label: StudyDesign-studyCells
definition: A USDM relationship between the InterventionalStudyDesign and StudyCell classes which identifies the set of study cells associated with the interventional study design.

label: StudyDesign-documentVersionIds
definition: A USDM relationship between the InterventionalStudyDesign and StudyDefinitionDocumentVersion classes which identifies the version of the study definition documents associated with the interventional study design.

label: StudyDesign-elements
definition: A USDM relationship between the InterventionalStudyDesign and StudyElement classes which identifies the set of study elements associated with the interventional study design.

label: StudyDesign-studyInterventionIds
definition: A USDM relationship between the InterventionalStudyDesign and StudyIntervention classes which identifies the set of study interventions associated with interventional study design.

label: StudyDesign-epochs
definition: A USDM relationship between the InterventionalStudyDesign and StudyEpoch classes which identifies the set of study epochs associated with the interventional study design.

label: StudyDesign-population
definition: A USDM relationship between the InterventionalStudyDesign and StudyDesignPopulation classes which identifies the population associated with the interventional study design.

label: StudyDesignPopulation-cohorts
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyDesignPopulation and StudyCohort classes which identifies the set of study cohorts associated with the study design population.

label: StudyElement-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the study element.

label: StudyElement-transitionEndRule
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyElement and TransitionRule classes which provides the details associated with a transition rule used to trigger the end of a study element.

label: StudyElement-studyInterventionIds
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyElement and StudyIntervention classes which identifies the set of study interventions associated with the study element.

label: StudyElement-transitionStartRule
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyElement and TransitionRule classes which provides the details associated with a transition rule used to trigger the start of a study element.

label: StudyEpoch-type
definition: A characterization or classification of the study epoch, i.e., the named time period defined in the protocol, wherein a study activity is specified and unchanging throughout the interval, to support a study-specific purpose.

label: StudyEpoch-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the study epoch.

label: StudyEpoch-previousId
definition: A USDM relationship within the StudyEpoch class which identifies the study epoch that chronologically precedes the current study epoch.

label: StudyEpoch-nextId
definition: A USDM relationship within the StudyEpoch class which identifies the study epoch that chronologically follows the current study epoch.

label: StudyIntervention-role
definition: The intended use of the trial intervention within the context of the study design.

label: StudyIntervention-type
definition: The kind of product or procedure studied in a trial.

label: StudyIntervention-codes
definition: A symbol or combination of symbols which is assigned to the study intervention.
boundCodelistNote: Y (Point out to multiple Biomedical coding dictionaries such as WHODrug, ATC, UNII, etc.)

label: StudyIntervention-minimumResponseDuration
definition: The value representing the minimum amount of time required to meet the criteria for response to study intervention.

label: StudyIntervention-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the study intervention.

label: StudyIntervention-administrations
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyIntervention and AgentAdministration classes which identifies the set of agent administrations associated with the study intervention.

label: StudyRole-code
definition: A symbol or combination of symbols which is assigned to the study role.

label: StudyRole-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the study role.

label: StudyRole-assignedPersons
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyRole and AssignedPerson classes that identifies the set of individuals that are assigned to fill a particular role within the study.

label: StudyRole-masking
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyRole and Masking classes which describes the masking associated with the study role.

label: StudyRole-organizationIds
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyRole and Organization classes which identifies the set of organizations associated with the study role.

label: StudyRole-appliesToIds
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyRole and either StudyVersion or StudyDesign classes that identifies the study version or study design to which the study role applies.

label: StudySite-country
definition: The country in which the study site is located.
boundCodelistNote: Y (Point out to ISO 3166-1 Alpha-3 Country code)

label: StudyTitle-type
definition: A characterization or classification of the study title.

label: StudyVersion-businessTherapeuticAreas
definition: A therapeutic area classification based on the structure and operations of the business unit.

label: StudyVersion-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the study version.

label: StudyVersion-abbreviations
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyVersion and Abbreviation classes which provides the set of abbreviations associated with the study version.

label: StudyVersion-dateValues
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyVersion and GovernanceDate classes which provides the set of governance dates associated with the study version.

label: StudyVersion-referenceIdentifiers
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyVersion and ReferenceIdentifier classes which identifies the set of reference identifiers associated with the study version.

label: StudyVersion-amendments
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyVersion and StudyAmendment classes which identifies the set of study amendments associated with the study version.

label: StudyVersion-documentVersionIds
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyVersion and StudyDefinitionDocumentVersion classes which identifies the version of the study definition document associated with the study version.

label: StudyVersion-studyDesigns
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyVersion and StudyDesign classes which identifies the set of study designs associated with the study version.

label: StudyVersion-studyIdentifiers
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyVersion and StudyIdentifier classes which identifies the set of study identifiers associated with the study version.

label: StudyVersion-titles
definition: A USDM relationship between the StudyVersion and StudyTitle classes which identifies the set of study titles associated with the study version.

label: SubjectEnrollment-quantity
definition: The value representing the number of individuals enrolled in a study.

label: SubjectEnrollment-forGeographicScope
definition: A USDM relationship between the SubjectEnrollment and GeographicScope classes which identifies the geographic scope to which the subject enrollment applies.

label: SubjectEnrollment-forStudyCohortId
definition: A USDM relationship between the SubjectEnrollment and StudyCohort classes which identifies the study cohort to which the subject enrollment applies.

label: SubjectEnrollment-forStudySiteId
definition: A USDM relationship between the SubjectEnrollment and StudySite classes which identifies the study site to which the subject enrollment applies.

label: Substance-codes
definition: A symbol or combination of symbols which is assigned to the substance.
boundCodelistNote: Y (Point out to multiple Biomedical coding dictionaries such as WHODrug, ATC, UNII, etc.)

label: Substance-strengths
definition: A USDM relationship between the Substance and Strength class which provides the values of the strengths of the substance.

label: Substance-referenceSubstance
definition: A USDM relationship within the Substance class that identifies the association between two substances, one of which is used as a reference for the other.

label: SyntaxTemplate-notes
definition: A brief written record relevant to the characteristic.

label: SyntaxTemplate-dictionaryId
definition: A USDM relationship between the Characteristic and SyntaxTemplateDictionary classes which provides the set of dictionary entries related to characteristics.

label: SyntaxTemplateDictionary-parameterMaps
definition: A USDM relationship between the SyntaxTemplateDictionary and ParameterMap classes which identifies the set of parameter maps (parameter map entries) associated with a syntax template dictionary.

label: Timing-type
definition: A characterization or classification of the chronological relationship between temporal events.

label: Timing-relativeToFrom
definition: The name of the reference event used to define the temporal relationship with another event.

label: Timing-relativeToScheduledInstanceId
definition: A USDM relationship between the Timing and ScheduledInstance classes which identifies the scheduled instance (e.g., scheduled activity instances or scheduled decision instances) to which the timing is relative to.

label: Timing-relativeFromScheduledInstanceId
definition: A USDM relationship between the Timing and ScheduledInstance classes which identifies the scheduled instance (e.g., scheduled activity instances or scheduled decision instances) to which the timing applies.
